📚 UofT Course Planner

Build Your Degree Path

Compare programs, schedule semesters, track breadth requirements — all in one place.

📘 How to Use This Planner
🔍 Pick Programs
Type in the search box to find your program (e.g. "Computer Science"). Add up to 3 per plan. Click ＋ Add Plan for side-by-side comparison.
✅ Mark Completed
Click any course card to toggle it as completed. Use Mark Past Done to complete all past-year courses at once.
↔ Switch Difficulty
Hover a course card and click ↔ to swap between standard and enriched paths (e.g. MAT137 ↔ MAT157).
✕ Remove Courses
Hover and click × to hide a course. Removed courses appear below the grid — click ↩ to restore them.
📋 Course Pool
Upper-year elective courses are in the blue pool section below the grid, grouped by topic. Click ＋ to add (prerequisites auto-included).
↕ Drag & Drop
Drag any course card to a different semester to move it. Summer works the same as Fall/Winter.
☀️ Summer
If Fall/Winter exceed 6 courses, extras overflow to Summer. You can also add courses directly to Summer.
🎯 Breadth & FCE
Green bar = breadth met. Orange = not yet. Red warning appears if total FCE exceeds 20.
📊 Plan Comparison

📋 Course data is for demonstration. Refer to the UTSG Academic Calendar for official requirements.

UofT Course Planner v1.0 · Self-contained · Zero dependencies
